name: AlarmService.GetAlarmList
comment: 获取告警列表（需提供 created_at 或 updated_at 时间筛选，TimeQuery target 使用毫秒时间戳范围）

alarm_level.comment: 告警等级: urgent超危/high高危/medium中危/low低危；数值: -1未知 0无威胁 1低危 2中危 3高危 4超危 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"high"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

alarm_name.comment: 告警名称 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

alarm_major_type.comment: 主要告警类型 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

alarm_minor_type.comment: 次要告警类型 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

attack_ip.comment: 攻击IP (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

victim_ip.comment: 受害IP (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

attack_ip_string.comment: 攻击IP(精确) (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"10.0.0.1"}]    // oper: =,!=,in,not in)

victim_ip_string.comment: 受害IP(精确) (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"10.0.0.1"}]    // oper: =,!=,in,not in)

attack_ip_asset.comment: 攻击IP资产 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"10.0.0.1"}]    // oper: =,!=,in,not in)

victim_ip_asset.comment: 受害IP资产 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"10.0.0.1"}]    // oper: =,!=,in,not in)

attack_ip_scope.comment: 攻击IP安全域 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

victim_ip_scope.comment: 受害IP安全域 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

attack_port.comment: 攻击端口 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

victim_port.comment: 受害端口 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

attack_direction.comment: 攻击方向: in外到内 out内到外 lateral内到内 other其他 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"in"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

attack_method.comment: 攻击方式 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

attack_result.comment: 攻击结果: -1未知 0默认 1成功 2失败 3疑似成功 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

attack_chain_phase.comment: 攻击链阶段: -1未知 1侦查 2入侵 3载荷投递 4命令与控制 5内网横向 6达成目标 7痕迹清理 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

attack_info.comment: ATT&CK信息 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

fall.comment: 失陷: -1未知 0默认 1失陷 2未失陷 3疑似失陷 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

judged_state.comment: 研判状态: 0未研判 1已确认 2已忽略 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

disposed_state.comment: 处置状态: 0未处置 1已处置 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

disposed_raw_status.comment: 工单发送状态 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

workflow_status.comment: 工单状态: 1未发送 2已发送 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

focused.comment: 是否为重点告警 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":true}]           // oper: =,!=)

is_asset_hit.comment: 是否命中资产: 0未命中 1命中 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

is_sub_cosmos_alarm.comment: 是否为下级告警 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":true}]           // oper: =,!=)

tag.comment: 标签过滤 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

ai_event_nature.comment: AI事件性质 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

ai_judgment_level.comment: AI研判等级 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

ai_judgment_result.comment: AI研判结果 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

created_at.comment: 告警创建时间（必需时间筛选之一；可用简写 startMs-endMs，如 0-1781501714000；或 JSON: [{"oper":"eq_in","target":"0-1781501714000"}]；target 为毫秒时间戳范围）

updated_at.comment: 告警更新时间（必需时间筛选之一；可用简写 startMs-endMs，如 0-1781501714000；或 JSON: [{"oper":"eq_in","target":"0-1781501714000"}]；target 为毫秒时间戳范围）

operation_at.comment: 告警操作时间 (TimeQuery JSON 或简写 startMs-endMs；target 为毫秒时间戳范围)

log_start_at.comment: 日志开始时间 (TimeQuery JSON 或简写 startMs-endMs；target 为毫秒时间戳范围)

log_end_at.comment: 日志结束时间 (TimeQuery JSON 或简写 startMs-endMs；target 为毫秒时间戳范围)

window_time.comment: 时间窗口 (TimeQuery JSON 或简写 startMs-endMs；target 为毫秒时间戳范围)

device_id.comment: 关联设备ID (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

device_id_int.comment: 关联设备ID(单值) (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

origin_log_id.comment: 关联安全告警日志ID (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

sub_cosmos_alarm_id.comment: 下级原始告警ID (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

sub_cosmos_device_ids.comment: 下级关联设备ID (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

host_asset_by_web.comment: 受害web应用关联IP资产 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

victim_web_asset_id.comment: 网站资产ID (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

victim_web_url.comment: URL筛选 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"array_in","target":"val"}]  // oper: like,not like,array_in,not array_in,inet_in)

business_ext.comment: 业务信息 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

comment.comment: 其他信息/备注 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

custom_data.comment: 用户自定义非告警字段 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":"value"}]       // oper: =,!=,like,not like,reg,is_null)

notice_status.comment: 通知状态: 1未通知 2已邮件 3已短信 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

operate_event.comment: 操作事件 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null (数组列，单值匹配))

hit_intelligence.comment: 命中情报: 0未知/未计算 1命中 2未命中 (JSON, 如: [{"oper":"=","target":1}]             // oper: =,!=,>,>=,<,<=,is_null)

alarm_level_statistics.comment: 是否对告警等级做统计

exclude_time_filter.comment: 排除时间筛选（配合 workflow_id 使用时允许跳过时间过滤）

created_at.comment: 分区键：告警创建时间（毫秒时间戳），用于加速查询

include_event_history.comment: 是否包含处置历史记录，默认 true

created_at.comment: 分区键：本批次最小告警创建时间（毫秒时间戳），用于加速查询

user_abnormal_behavior.account_info.comment: 用户异常行为-账户信息

user_abnormal_behavior.attacker_info.comment: 用户异常行为-攻击者信息

user_abnormal_behavior.suspicious_action.comment: 用户异常行为-可疑操作

user_abnormal_behavior.victim_info.comment: 用户异常行为-受害者信息

created_at.comment: 分区键：告警创建时间（毫秒时间戳），用于加速查询

alarm_level.comment: 告警等级: urgent超危/high高危/medium中危/low低危；数值: -1未知 0无威胁 1低危 2中危 3高危 4超危（必填）

attack_direction.comment: 攻击方向: in外到内 out内到外 lateral内到内 other其他

attack_result.comment: 攻击结果: -1未知 0默认 1成功 2失败 3疑似成功（必填）

fall.comment: 失陷: -1未知 0默认 1失陷 2未失陷 3疑似失陷（必填）

attack_chain_phase.comment: 攻击链阶段: -1未知 1侦查 2入侵 3载荷投递 4命令与控制 5内网横向 6达成目标 7痕迹清理（必填）

created_at.comment: 分区键：告警创建时间（毫秒时间戳），用于加速查询
分区键：批量研判时传递最小的告警创建时间（毫秒时间戳），用于分区裁剪
